subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath manifested that which was hidden, and the Name that held dominion over all names, and He is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اظهر ما کان مستورا و الاسم الذی کان مهیمنا علی الاسماء و هو
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @praise and encouragement
